description_long: This is a classic wooden baseball bat with a natural, weathered finish, showing signs of use and age. The bat features a cylindrical barrel that tapers smoothly into a thinner handle, ending in a rounded knob for grip. The wood grain is visible throughout, with some discoloration and scuff marks, suggesting frequent handling or play. There are no visible logos, brand markings, or decorative elements on the barrel or handle. The surface appears matte with a slightly rough texture, typical of unfinished or lightly finished wood. The bat is of standard length and thickness, suitable for use in recreational or professional baseball games.
description: A weathered wooden baseball bat with a natural finish, visible wood grain, and no markings or logos. The bat has a classic shape with a rounded knob and a slightly rough, matte surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat, highlighting the smooth taper from barrel to handle and the natural wood grain.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, displaying the rounded knob and the circular cross-section of the bat.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the bat's length and subtle surface wear.
description_view_3: End-on view of the barrel, revealing the rounded end and the bat's diameter.
